message:
fix(errno): cfg-guard libc errno sync for standalone mode (bd-h5x.4)

In interpose mode, set_abi_errno writes to both FrankenLibC's internal
errno and libc::__errno_location() for ABI compatibility. In standalone
mode, we are the sole libc, so the sync is unnecessary.

- Add #[cfg(not(feature = "standalone"))] guard around libc call
- Add errno_abi to interpose_allowlist (intentional call-through)
- Add errno_abi and string_abi fixtures for replacement guard
- Update callthrough_families and census to match source scan

Verification:
- bash scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh interpose: PASS
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test errno_abi_test: 21/21 PASS
- rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets -- -D warnings: PASS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -92,6 +92,7 @@
     "description": "Modules permitted to call through to host glibc in interpose (LD_PRELOAD) mode. These modules have not yet been fully reimplemented.",
     "modules": [
       "c11threads_abi",
+      "errno_abi",
       "fortify_abi",
       "glibc_internal_abi",
       "io_internal_abi",
@@ -122,6 +123,7 @@

     "source": "replacement_guard_source_scan",

       "io_internal_abi",

       "termios_abi",
       "unistd_abi"
     ],
@@ -173,6 +176,13 @@
   "call_through_census": {
     "description": "Current census of direct host libc/host pthread escape hatches by ABI module, as scanned by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh.",
     "modules": {
+      "errno_abi": {
+        "count": 1,
+        "functions": [
+          "__errno_location"
+        ],
+        "note": "Intentional host errno sync in interpose mode; cfg-guarded out in standalone/replacement builds."
+      },
       "fortify_abi": {
         "count": 14,
         "functions": [
@@ -390,9 +400,16 @@
       "dlfcn_abi": {
         "count": 0,
         "functions": []
+      },
+      "string_abi": {
+        "count": 4,
+        "functions": [
+          "calloc",
+          "free"
+        ]
       }
     },
-    "total_call_throughs": 388,
+    "total_call_throughs": 293,
     "note": "Census tracks direct host call-through scan patterns used by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh."
   }
 }

@@ -8,6 +8,40 @@
     "source_scan": "crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/*_abi.rs"
   },
   "fixtures": [
+    {
+      "id": "interpose_allow_errno_abi___errno_location",
+      "mode": "interpose",
+      "module": "errno_abi",
+      "symbol": "__errno_location",
+      "expected_outcome": "allowed",
+      "evidence_source": "replacement_guard_source_scan",
+      "note": "Intentional host errno sync in interpose mode; cfg-guarded out in standalone/replacement builds"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "replacement_forbid_errno_abi___errno_location",
+      "mode": "replacement",
+      "module": "errno_abi",
+      "symbol": "__errno_location",
+      "expected_outcome": "forbidden",
+      "evidence_source": "replacement_guard_source_scan",
+      "note": "In standalone/replacement builds, libc::__errno_location call is cfg-guarded out"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "interpose_allow_string_abi_calloc",
+      "mode": "interpose",
+      "module": "string_abi",
+      "symbol": "calloc",
+      "expected_outcome": "allowed",
+      "evidence_source": "replacement_guard_source_scan"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "replacement_forbid_string_abi_free",
+      "mode": "replacement",
+      "module": "string_abi",
+      "symbol": "free",
+      "expected_outcome": "forbidden",
+      "evidence_source": "replacement_guard_source_scan"
+    },
     {
       "id": "interpose_allow_termios_abi_cfmakeraw",
       "mode": "interpose",
